claim_text: In preclinical animal models, Kreis, et al, showed that dynamic DMI acquisitions at 9.4T could be used to acquire quantitative and spatially resolved measurements of glycolytic flux in tumors15 , which can be used to assess treatment response46 .

sub_claims.text: In preclinical animal models, Kreis, et al, showed that dynamic DMI acquisitions at 9.4T could be used to acquire quantitative and spatially resolved measurements of glycolytic flux in tumors15 , which can be used to assess treatment response46 .
